location: Metropolitan Correctional Center (MCC), New York City NY
text: Ghislaine Maxwell transported to MCC New York at 5:15am, April 13, 2021, held in 5th floor cell block

location: Big Spring Correctional Center, Big Spring TX
text: BOP records document inmate death at Big Spring SHU — facility linked to Epstein network document trove
Leon and Debra Black visited Epstein's Wyoming ranch for lunch, then flew together to Los Angeles on their plane.
Epstein and associates traveled to Omaha for the Berkshire Hathaway annual shareholders' meeting.
Epstein scheduled a full day at Harvard University — "a full day of smarts" — departing at 7am, returning at midnight.
